normalization.description: Standard graph-theoretic degree centrality: degree / (N - 1) where N = file_count. Values in [0.0, 1.0] regardless of project size.

false_positive_catalog.description: ast counts imports inside 'if TYPE_CHECKING:' blocks equally with runtime imports, inflating in-degree for files only imported for type checking.
false_positive_catalog.detection_rule: Requires scope-aware ast walking (not implemented in current indexer)
false_positive_catalog.mitigation: Document as known ast limitation; future SCIP indexer could resolve.

false_positive_catalog.description: If source root discovery includes test utilities, those files inflate centrality of modules they test.
false_positive_catalog.mitigation: Upstream 40.3s already excludes test directories; validate at 40.3c level.

governance.no_authority_statement: This artifact provides structural centrality EVIDENCE. It does NOT influence DOM layer generation, pressure zone computation, SQO promotion, semantic derivation, CSR construction, or any S-state logic. Downstream consumption requires a separate governed stream.
governance.projection_recommendation: Centrality evidence produced only. Evidence-ranked projection requires separate validation stream.
